voice_observations.caption_text:
Come Together with Khalil & Varun from @vkdhospitality 

Ten years, countless memories and a community at the heart of it all. The co-founders share how friendship, family and a shared vision have shaped their journey.. and the spaces they’ve built together.

Varun wears Ferragamo and Khalil wears Maison Margiela, available on levelshoes.com
voice_observations.voiceover_text: We oftentimes look at each other throughout this 10-year journey, and we're like, man, I'm so happy that we have each other. My name is Khalil Dahmash. I'm one of the managing partners and co-founders of VKD Hospitality Group. My name is Varun Kimani, and I'm also a co-founder of VKD Hospitality Group. For me, coming together is about community. You have to build something that has longevity. I don't think we would have gotten to 10 years of Miss Lillies, which we're celebrating this July, if it wasn't for community. I would describe Varun as detail-oriented, stubborn at times, someone I could have a very good time with. I would describe KD as someone who has a great knack of bringing people together. He's also very hardworking, just one of my best friends, really. If I were a shoe, I think I'd be a sneaker. I could be dressed down or dressed up. If I were a shoe, I'd maybe be like a dad shoe. Family, business partner, and a real good time. Business partner, family, best friend. He's all of those.
